category.scope_note: Household refrigerating appliances comparison: China domestic compliance vs Saudi Arabia SASO / SABER market-access requirements.

title.en: China-to-Saudi Arabia Household Refrigerator Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国家用电冰箱进入沙特阿拉伯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國家用電冰箱進入沙特阿拉伯：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese household refrigerator compliance (CCC, GB 4706.13, GB 12021.2) against Saudi Arabia's SABER platform requirements: Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC), SASO 2663 / SASO 2892 energy efficiency MEPS, IEC 60335-2-24 electrical safety, SEEC energy label, and R600a refrigerant handling.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国家用电冰箱合规（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）与沙特阿拉伯SABER平台要求差距对照：产品符合性证书（PCoC）与货物符合性证书（SCoC）、SASO 2663 / SASO 2892能效MEPS、IEC 60335-2-24电气安全、SEEC能效标签及R600a制冷剂处理。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國家用電冰箱合規（CCC、GB 4706.13、GB 12021.2）與沙特阿拉伯SABER平台要求差距對照：產品符合性證書（PCoC）與貨物符合性證書（SCoC）、SASO 2663 / SASO 2892能效MEPS、IEC 60335-2-24電氣安全、SEEC能效標籤及R600a製冷劑處理。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current SASO technical regulations, SABER registration requirements, energy efficiency thresholds, and refrigerant provisions with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构裁定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行SASO技术法规、SABER注册要求、能效门槛值及制冷剂条款。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構裁定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行SASO技術法規、SABER註冊要求、能效門檻值及製冷劑條款。

answer_first.en: Chinese household refrigerator manufacturers face four major Saudi compliance gaps: (1) electrical safety testing to IEC 60335-2-24 accepted under the SASO/SABER regime — CCC/GB 4706.13 certification is not accepted, and the importer must obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC); (2) energy efficiency to SASO 2663 / SASO 2892 (among the world's strictest refrigerator MEPS, designed for high-ambient Gulf conditions) with mandatory SEEC energy label registration — Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not transfer; (3) per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) issued via the SABER platform before customs clearance at Jeddah / Dammam ports; and (4) a Saudi-resident importer of record who registers the product on SABER — there is no manufacturer self-declaration route. R600a refrigerant is well-positioned but charge documentation against IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA must be verified for high-ambient (T-class) operation.
answer_first.zh: 中国家用电冰箱制造商面临四大沙特合规差距：（1）电气安全须按IEC 60335-2-24检测（在SASO/SABER制度下被接受）——CCC/GB 4706.13认证不被接受，且进口商须取得产品符合性证书（PCoC）；（2）能效须符合SASO 2663 / SASO 2892（全球最严格的冰箱MEPS之一，专为海湾高环境温度条件设计）并强制注册SEEC能效标签——中国GB 12021.2等级不可转移；（3）每批货物须在SABER平台上取得货物符合性证书（SCoC），方可在吉达/达曼港口清关；（4）须有一名在沙特境内的进口记录方在SABER上注册产品——不存在制造商自我声明路径。R600a制冷剂具备良好条件，但须核实充注量文件在高环境温度（T类）运行下是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國家用電冰箱製造商面臨四大沙特合規差距：（1）電氣安全須按IEC 60335-2-24檢測（在SASO/SABER制度下被接受）——CCC/GB 4706.13認證不被接受，且進口商須取得產品符合性證書（PCoC）；（2）能效須符合SASO 2663 / SASO 2892（全球最嚴格的冰箱MEPS之一，專為海灣高環境溫度條件設計）並強制註冊SEEC能效標籤——中國GB 12021.2等級不可轉移；（3）每批貨物須在SABER平台上取得貨物符合性證書（SCoC），方可在吉達/達曼港口清關；（4）須有一名在沙特境內的進口記錄方在SABER上註冊產品——不存在製造商自我聲明路徑。R600a製冷劑具備良好條件，但須核實充注量文件在高環境溫度（T類）運行下是否符合IEC 60335-2-24附件AA要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, conformity assessment body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs not accepted. SASO.gov.sa and the SABER platform (saber.sa) are the canonical sources for Saudi technical regulations and conformity assessment.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.

q.en: Does a Chinese refrigerator's CCC certification satisfy Saudi SABER requirements?
q.zh: 中国冰箱的CCC认证是否满足沙特SABER要求？
q.zht: 中國冰箱的CCC認證是否滿足沙特SABER要求？

a.en: No. Saudi market access requires a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC) and per-shipment Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) issued through the SABER platform, based on testing to SASO-adopted standards (IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, SASO 2663/2892 for energy efficiency). Chinese CCC certification references GB standards and is not accepted as equivalent for Saudi market access.
a.zh: 不。进入沙特市场须通过SABER平台取得产品符合性证书（PCoC）及每批货物的货物符合性证书（SCoC），其依据为按SASO采用标准（安全方面IEC 60335-2-24，能效方面SASO 2663/2892）进行的检测。中国CCC认证参考GB标准，不被接受为进入沙特市场的等效证明。
a.zht: 不。進入沙特市場須通過SABER平台取得產品符合性證書（PCoC）及每批貨物的貨物符合性證書（SCoC），其依據為按SASO採用標準（安全方面IEC 60335-2-24，能效方面SASO 2663/2892）進行的檢測。中國CCC認證參考GB標準，不被接受為進入沙特市場的等效證明。

q.en: What is SABER and is registration mandatory for refrigerators in Saudi Arabia?
q.zh: SABER是什么，沙特冰箱是否须强制注册？
q.zht: SABER是什麼，沙特冰箱是否須強制註冊？

a.en: SABER (saber.sa) is Saudi Arabia's mandatory electronic conformity-assessment platform operated by SASO. For regulated products such as refrigerators, the Saudi importer must obtain a Product Certificate of Conformity (PCoC, valid one year) and then a Shipment Certificate of Conformity (SCoC) for each consignment before goods clear customs at ports such as Jeddah and Dammam. Registration is mandatory; goods cannot be cleared without a valid SCoC.
a.zh: SABER（saber.sa）是由SASO运营的沙特强制性电子合格评定平台。对于冰箱等受管制产品，沙特进口商须先取得产品符合性证书（PCoC，有效期一年），再为每批货物取得货物符合性证书（SCoC），方可在吉达、达曼等港口清关。注册为强制性要求；无有效SCoC货物不得清关。
a.zht: SABER（saber.sa）是由SASO運營的沙特強制性電子合格評定平台。對於冰箱等受管制產品，沙特進口商須先取得產品符合性證書（PCoC，有效期一年），再為每批貨物取得貨物符合性證書（SCoC），方可在吉達、達曼等港口清關。註冊為強制性要求；無有效SCoC貨物不得清關。

q.en: Is R600a (isobutane) permitted as a refrigerant in Saudi household refrigerators?
q.zh: R600a（异丁烷）是否被允许作为沙特家用冰箱的制冷剂？
q.zht: R600a（異丁烷）是否被允許作為沙特家用冰箱的製冷劑？

a.en: Yes. R600a is permitted and widely used in Saudi-market household refrigerators. However, refrigerant charge limits and flammability safety requirements under IEC 60335-2-24 Annex AA must be met, and the appliance must be verified for high-ambient (T-class, up to 43 °C) operation typical of the Gulf climate. Energy efficiency under SASO 2663 / SASO 2892 is tested at high ambient temperature, which is stricter than temperate-climate test conditions.
a.zh: 是的。R600a被允许且在沙特市场家用冰箱中广泛使用。但须符合IEC 60335-2-24附录AA下的制冷剂充注量限制和可燃性安全要求，且器具须经核实可在海湾气候典型的高环境温度（T类，最高43°C）下运行。SASO 2663 / SASO 2892下的能效在高环境温度条件下测试，较温带气候测试条件更严格。
a.zht: 是的。R600a被允許且在沙特市場家用冰箱中廣泛使用。但須符合IEC 60335-2-24附錄AA下的製冷劑充注量限制和可燃性安全要求，且器具須經核實可在海灣氣候典型的高環境溫度（T類，最高43°C）下運行。SASO 2663 / SASO 2892下的能效在高環境溫度條件下測試，較溫帶氣候測試條件更嚴格。
